meta.purpose: Conectar páginas/memórias/tags a prompts visuais curáveis antes da criação de assets definitivos.
meta.flow: tags -> prompt_seed -> candidates -> approval -> assets.json -> render

maresia.prompt_seed: soft editorial image of a childhood memory by the sea, warm coastal light, poetic but realistic, magazine hero image, not tourist advertising

moon-source.prompt_seed: abstract editorial image of a living archive interface under moonlight, elegant knowledge system, minimal wiki-magazine aesthetic, luminous but restrained

nostalgia-room.prompt_seed: nostalgic editorial still life of an early 2000s bedroom with old computer glow, game memory, soft analog texture, intimate and elegant

mirror-water.prompt_seed: poetic editorial image of mirror water, soft feminine light, identity and becoming, dignified and non-erotic, refined magazine aesthetic

sanctuary-green.prompt_seed: lush house-sanctuary editorial image, plants, warm domestic light, animals implied, safe future home, elegant ecological atmosphere

lithia-atelier.prompt_seed: editorial fantasy cartography desk, parchment maps, moonlit studio, mythic worldbuilding atmosphere, refined and literary
